cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.desc: We use essential cookies to make our site work, and optional analytics cookies to improve your experience.

chatWidget.botWelcome: Hi! I'm GateFlow's help assistant. How can I help you today?
chatWidget.botFallback: Thanks for your question! Our team will get back to you shortly. For immediate help, visit our Help Center or email hello@gateflow.io.

faqs.a: GateFlow's scanner app queues scans locally with AES-256 encryption when offline. Once reconnected, it automatically syncs to the dashboard with deduplication. No scan is ever lost.

faqs.q: Can I try GateFlow for free?
faqs.a: Yes! Our Starter plan is free for up to 1 gate and 500 scans/month — no credit card needed. Visit our pricing page to compare plans.

faqs.q: How many gates can I manage?
faqs.a: Starter: 1 gate. Pro: up to 10 gates. Enterprise: unlimited gates. You can also add individual gates for a monthly add-on fee.
All QR codes are HMAC-SHA256 signed. Offline data uses AES-256 encryption. API access uses short-lived JWT tokens (15-min expiry) with rotation. We follow zero-trust principles throughout.
